title: Allahabad University PGAT Admissions Online Form 2026
short_information: Central University of Allahabad, Prayagraj (U.P.) has released the Information Brochure for UOA AU Pravesh PGAT I and PGAT II Various Courses 2026 Those Candidates are Interested to the Admsission in AU PGAT 2026 Exam Can Apply Online from 05/05/2026 to 25/05/2026.candidates should read the AU PGAT 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply. Central University of Allahabad, Prayagraj (U.P.) Allahabad University UOA PGAT Admission 2026 AU PGAT 2026 Admissions : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: s PGAT I Course : General / OBC / EWS : 1000/- SC / ST : 500/- Page II Courses : General / OBC / EWS : 1600/- SC / ST : 800/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Only.
